views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's study time, active skills with progress rings, current streak, and weekly study bar chart at a glance

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log a study session — pick or type the skill name, choose category and session type, set duration and progress, optionally note milestones and takeaways

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable date-grouped list of all study sessions with filtering by skill name and category, plus a calendar heatmap showing study density

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep insights: time-per-category pie chart, weekly study trend line, per-skill progress timeline, session type breakdown, confidence growth curve, and AI-generated study pattern insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayStudyMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all entries dated today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of study sessions logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyStudyMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for the current Mon–Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one study session ending today or yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive study day streak

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeSkills
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique skillName values that have entries in the last 14 days, sorted by most recent

viewModelComputedProperties.name: skillProgressMap
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dictionary mapping each unique skillName to its most recent progressPercent value

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalHoursInvested
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time sum of durationMinutes divided by 60, rounded to one decimal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in total study minutes this week vs. previous week — positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each LearningCategory with its share of total study minutes as a fraction (for pie chart)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyStudyData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of (date, totalMinutes) pairs for bar chart visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sessionTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of sessions per SessionType for understanding study method balance

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageConfidence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean confidenceRating across all entries, rounded to one decimal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topSkillByTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The skillName with the highest total durationMinutes across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: confidenceTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Weekly average confidence rating over time for trend line visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: weeklyStudyMinutes divided by weekly goal target as a 0.0–1.0 fraction

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: e.g. 'You study 40% more on weekends', 'Your confidence in Swift grew from 2.1 to 4.3', 'Practice sessions correlate with fastest progress gains'

dailyGoal.description: Target study minutes per day — user can adjust; used to fill the dashboard progress ring

weeklyGoal.description: Target total study minutes per week — drives the weekly goal progress ring on analytics

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one study session with durationMinutes >= 5 was logged. Streak breaks if a calendar day passes with zero qualifying sessions.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week total study minutes to previous week. Track per-skill progress velocity (change in progressPercent per week). Monitor confidence rating trajectory per skill over rolling 4-week windows. Identify most productive day-of-week and time-of-day patterns from entry timestamps.
insights: Study consistency score: ratio of active days to total days in last 30 days (e.g. '22/30 days — Excellent consistency')
Time allocation balance: flag if one category dominates >70% of total time ('90% of study time on Programming — consider diversifying')
Practice vs passive ratio: compare hands-on (practice + project) minutes to passive (video + reading) — research shows 60%+ active learning is optimal
Fastest-growing skill: the skill with the largest progressPercent increase over the last 2 weeks
Stale skill alert: any skill with >50% progress but no sessions in 7+ days ('Swift hasn't been touched in 12 days — knowledge may decay')
Session length optimization: flag if average session >90 min ('Consider breaking into 45-min focused blocks for better retention')
Confidence-progress correlation: identify skills where confidence lags behind progress (may need review) or exceeds progress (Dunning-Kruger alert)
Weekly momentum: 'You studied 3.2 more hours this week vs last week — great momentum!' or 'Study time dropped 40% — get back on track'
